title: Elbow Grease Hand Grip Scourer - Heavy Duty | Suitable for Oven Racks, Non-Coated Cookware, Pots & Pans - Double Strength | Removes Tough and Stubborn Stains - Washing Up Sponge (4 Pack Yellow/Green)
features: POWERFUL ON TOUGH GRIME: These heavy-duty scourers are built to handle stubborn dirt with ease. Great for cleaning burnt-on food from baking trays or scrubbing grills after a summer BBQ. They lift away stuck-on mess without breaking a sweat.

DOUBLE-SIDED DESIGN: Each dish sponge features a soft sponge on one side and a heavy-duty scourer on the other. The softer side is ideal for wiping worktops or soaking up spills, while the rough side powers through grease and grime on pans and racks.
SUITABLE FOR MULTIPLE SURFACES: These cleaning sponges are ideal for hard, durable surfaces. Great for ceramic hobs, stainless sinks, metal trays and more.

PERFECT FOR EVERYDAY WASHING UP: Ideal as everyday washing up sponges, these help keep dishes, cutlery and cookware sparkling. From weekday dinners to Sunday roasts, they make it easy to scrub, rinse and repeat without fuss.

ERGONOMIC HAND GRIP SHAPE: Designed with comfort in mind, the hand grip shape fits easily in the palm for better control while scrubbing. Whether tackling greasy oven trays or wiping the hob, these scourers help reduce strain while cleaning.

REUSABLE & LONG LASTING: These kitchen sponges are made to be used again and again. Simply rinse after use and store in a dry place. A reliable choice for eco-conscious households who want to cut down on disposable cleaning supplies.

IDEAL FOR TOUGH KITCHEN TASKS: Perfect for cleaning non-coated cookware, stainless steel pots and cast-iron pans. These scourers are a great go-to when a gentle sponge just won’t do the trick – even after a baked-on casserole.

VERSATILE CLEANING TOOL: Not just for dishes – use these scourers on oven racks, stovetops or even garden tools. Whether deep cleaning the kitchen or freshening up outdoor gear, they’re always up to the task.

BRIGHT COLOUR CHOICES: Available in vibrant Yellow & Green or a bold Pink pack, these scourers add a splash of colour to any sinkside setup. Fun, functional and easy to find in a full washing up bowl.
EVERY KITCHEN ESSENTIAL: From everyday dish sponge duties to weekend deep-cleans, these Elbow Grease scourers are a must-have. Keep a pack under the sink, ready for whatever mess comes next.
description: Tackle tough stains with the cleaning power of Elbow Grease Hand Grip Scourers. Designed for heavy-duty tasks, these double strength scourers make light work of burnt-on food, stubborn grime, and everyday mess. Each sponge is dual-sided, combining a soft layer for gentle surfaces with a durable scourer that powers through tough stains. Whether deep-cleaning oven racks or scrubbing greasy pots, these kitchen sponges offer a strong, comfortable grip and lasting performance. Reusable and built to endure, they’re ideal for busy kitchens where reliable results are a must. Choose from bold yellow & green or a vibrant pink pack to match any style. These scourers are an essential addition to any washing up routine – scrubbing through the mess so you don't have to.
